title: Devrantha Manushya
subTitle: Geetha falls in love with Pratham, a young man with an unusual alcoholic habit, and strives to change him for the better. However, she is unaware of the implications.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati advises Lord Shiva to strike Tripura Sundari since she is a form of Adi Shakthi, but he refuses. Later, the Asuras seize the chance and dart the Shivastra at Lord Shiva.

title: Face 2 Face
subTitle: Santhosh, an aspiring actor, is in love with a woman named Preethi. When an incident tears them apart, Santhosh tries to win her back with the help of Sneha, who is in the middle of a divorce.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Lord Shiva accedes to Tarakasura's demand and presents him with the Shivastra, Lord Vishnu intervenes by dispelling the spell and restoring balance to the cosmic universe. Will the wedding proceed as scheduled amidst these celestial interventions?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati exchange garlands during the wedding ceremony. Later, Lord Shiva expresses his gratitude to Himavan for offering his daughter's hand in marriage. How will Himavan react to this expression of gratitude?

title: Ondagona Baa
subTitle: Raghu comes to his paternal village to attend his grandfather's diamond jubilee function. He finds out that due to his uncle, his family was separated, and tries to fix things.

title: Ganesha
subTitle: Ganesha makes two promises to his dying father, but trouble ensues in his house when he breaks the first one. Soon, he has to break his second promise in order to avoid more problems.

title: Amrithadhare
subTitle: Puru and Amritha are a married couple deeply in love with each other. However, they face challenges as they try to balance their conflicting desires in their marriage.

title: Ayogya
subTitle: Siddhe Gowda, an unemployed young man, decides to run against Bachche Gowda, the village head, in the local election. He also begins to fall in love with Nandini, the daughter of a marriage broker.

title: 777 Charlie
subTitle: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

title: Oorigitta Kolli
subTitle: A vivacious young girl is overjoyed to marry the son of a wealthy landlord. However, her joyous married life experiences a sudden jolt when her father-in-law is murdered by a cunning moneylender.

title: Oorigitta Kolli
subTitle: A vivacious young girl is overjoyed to marry the son of a wealthy landlord. However, her joyous married life experiences a sudden jolt when her father-in-law is murdered by a cunning moneylender.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Lord Shiva accedes to Tarakasura's demand and presents him with the Shivastra, Lord Vishnu intervenes by dispelling the spell and restoring balance to the cosmic universe. Will the wedding proceed as scheduled amidst these celestial interventions?

title: Lakshmi Narayanara Prapanchane Bere
subTitle: Lakshmi seeks help from a psychiatrist to cure her husband, Narayana, of his extreme psychological disorder which acts a barrier in their relationship.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Mainadevi becomes displeased with Lord Shiva for bestowing Shivastra upon Tarakasura, despite the joyous occasion of Lord Shiva and Parvati completing their wedding ceremony.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: 777 Charlie
subTitle: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

title: Deadly Soma
subTitle: Somasekhara, a bright student, clashes with a gangster's brother post a kabbadi match. This rivalry unexpectedly pulls him into a crime spree.

title: Badava Rascal
subTitle: Shankar, a young man, is kidnapped by a gang of thugs. In order to escape his predicament, he narrates his life story to make his abductors rethink their decision.

title: Karva
subTitle: An NRI seeks the help of a television crew to sell his haunted ancestral property. However, the daughter of a wealthy man gets kidnapped and is held hostage in the same bungalow.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Ranachandi
subTitle: Sahana falls in love with Naveen. Later, she is sent to jail for a crime she did not commit and waits to exact revenge from the culprit.

title: Ranachandi
subTitle: Sahana falls in love with Naveen. Later, she is sent to jail for a crime she did not commit and waits to exact revenge from the culprit.

title: Toss
subTitle: Toss is a 2017 Indian Kannada romantic comedy film written, directed and co-produced by Dayal Padmanabhan. The film stars Vijay Raghavendra, Sandeep and Ramya Barna in the lead roles.The film, under the banner of D Pictures and Om productions, was launched by Puneeth Rajkumar on 27 January 2012. After being in development for more than 5 years, the film is set to release on 21 July 2017.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Parvati journeys towards Kailash alongside Lord Shiva, memories of her past life as Sati flood her mind, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. Meanwhile, in the realm of the Asuras, a search ensues for a suitable bride for Tarakasura.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Grama Devathe
subTitle: Angala Parameswari, an avatar of Goddess Parvati, wants to protect the people of Earth. Kaveri, her ardent follower, seeks her help when her life is in danger.

title: Sye
subTitle: Chakri, who dreams to become a police officer, falls for a woman named Kannika. But things change when Mosale, a corrupt policeman, provokes him to fight.

title: Kanti
subTitle: A Marathi woman, Reema, and a Kannadiga man, Kanti, fall in love. Their romantic story takes a political turn when Samblekar, a Maharashtrian politician, wants to exploit the situation.

title: Chandra Chakori
subTitle: Puttaraju and Sevanthi fall in love with each other. Sevanthi's father puts forth a condition for their marriage which Puttaraju must fulfil.

title: Minchina Ota
subTitle: Two petty thieves rope other small-time criminals into their get-rich-quick schemes and attempt to steal cars for a living.
